prompt: For a protein engineering research program, predict the structure of Diacylglycerol acyltransferase/mycolyltransferase Ag85B (P9WQP1) from Mycobacterium tuberculosis using ESMFold. outline the prediction methodology, confidence assessment strategy, multi-state modeling considerations, and validation plan.
